items.title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
items.summary: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.

items.title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
items.summary: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

items.title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rises further, WHO warns
items.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普：美伊談判進入最後階段　若破局不排除再動武
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天表示，美方與伊朗的談判已進入「最後階段」，但他也警告，除非伊朗當局同意達成和平協議，否則美方可能再動武。  路透社報導，川普為促成停火而暫停對伊朗的「史詩怒火行動」（Oper...…

items.title: 美國司法部起訴卡斯楚　華府加強向古巴施壓
items.summary: 美國法院的紀錄顯示，美國司法部因為1996年有民航機被古巴擊落的事件，依涉嫌共謀殺害美國公民及其他罪名，於今天起訴目前高齡94歲的古巴前總統勞爾．卡斯楚。  綜合法新社與路透社報導，已故古巴...…

items.title: 美陸戰隊日本富士山試射海馬士 火力可涵蓋台海嚇阻中國
items.summary: 美國陸戰隊20日在日本著名的富士山麓靶場，透過高機動性多管火箭系統（HIMARS，海馬士）發射車試射十幾枚火箭彈。這項演習旨在維持美軍對海馬士系統的操作熟練度，對太平洋地區而...…
